debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : DecidableEq α
inst✝¹ : MeasurableSingletonClass α
alg : Algorithm α ℝ
ν : Kernel α ℝ
inst✝ : IsMarkovKernel ν
a b : α
hab : a ≠ b
⊢ IndepFun (fun ω s => rewardByCount a s ω) (fun ω s => rewardByCount b s ω) (Bandit.measure alg ν)

failed_attempts:
have h := iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν
  exact h.indepFun_disjoint (s := {p | p.1 = a}) (t := {p | p.1 = b})
    (Set.disjoint_left.mpr fun p ha hb => hab (ha.symm.trans hb))

have h := iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν
  refine IndepFun.comp (f := fun s ↦ (a, s)) (g := fun s ↦ (b, s)) ?_ measurable_id measurable_id
  refine h.indepFun_prod_mk_prod_mk (I := Set.univ) (J := Set.univ) (fun p hp ↦ ?_)
  simp only [Set.mem_univ, Prod.mk.injEq, true_and] at hp ⊢
  exact fun h ↦ hab (h.1)

have h := iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν
  exact h.indepFun_prod_mk (fun n ↦ (a, n)) (fun n ↦ (b, n)) (fun i j hij ↦ by simp [hab])

have h := iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν (α := α)
  exact h.indepFun_prod_mk (fun n => (a, n)) (fun n => (b, n)) (fun i j => by simp [hab])

have ha := identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a
  have hb := identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream (alg := alg) (ν := ν) b
  have h_indep : IndepFun (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n a) (fun ω n ↦ ω.2 n b) 𝔓 := by
    rw [← Bandit.snd_measure alg ν, Measure.snd]
    rw [indepFun_map_iff (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
    exact indepFun_eval_eval_streamMeasure ν hab
  exact ha.symm.indepFun hb.symm h_indep

have h := iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν (α := α)
  exact h.indepFun_pi_disjoint (fun n ↦ (a, n)) (fun n ↦ (b, n)) (fun i j ↦ by simp [hab])

have h := iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν
  exact h.indepFun_prod_mk (i := a) (j := b) (hij := hab)

have h := iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν (α := α)
  have h1 : (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount a s ω) = (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount (a, s).1 (a, s).2 ω) := rfl
  have h2 : (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount b s ω) = (fun ω s ↦ rewardByCount (b, s).1 (b, s).2 ω) := rfl
  rw [h1, h2]
  refine IndepFun.pi_pi ?_ ?_ ?_
  · intro n m
    exact h.indepFun (i := (a, n)) (j := (b, m)) (by simp [hab])
  · exact fun n ↦ by fun_prop
  · exact fun n ↦ by fun_prop

have h := iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν (α := α)
  exact h.indepFun_disjoint_range (by simp [Set.disjoint_iff, hab])

have h := iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν
  exact h.indepFun_pi (s := {p | p.1 = a}) (t := {p | p.1 = b}) (by aesop)

have h := iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν (α := α)
  exact (h.indepFun (show (a, 0) ≠ (b, 0) by simp [hab])).comp (measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun _ ↦ by fun_prop) (measurable_pi_iff.mpr fun _ ↦ by fun_prop)

have h := iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν (α := α)
  exact h.indepFun_pi_disjoint (fun n ↦ (a, n)) (fun n ↦ (b, n)) (by simp [hab])

have h := iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν (α := α)
  have hab' : ∀ (s t : ℕ), (a, s) ≠ (b, t) := fun s t ↦ by simp [hab]
  exact h.indepFun_pi_of_ne hab'

have h := iIndepFun_rewardByCount alg ν
  exact h.indepFun (f := fun p ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2)
    (i := (a, 0)) (j := (b, 0)) (by simp [hab])
